topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)

passage.title: A Day with Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)
passage.text: I eat rice. I am eating rice. I have eaten rice. I have been eating rice for an hour. I ate rice. I was eating rice. I had eaten rice. I had been eating rice for an hour. I will eat rice. I will be eating rice.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं चावल खाता हूँ। मैं चावल खा रहा हूँ। मैंने चावल खाया है। मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा हूँ। मैंने चावल खाया। मैं चावल खा रहा था। मैं चावल खा चुका था। मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा था। मैं चावल खाऊँगा। मैं चावल खा रहा होऊँगा।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I eat rice...."?
options: I had been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I eat rice."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I am eating rice...."?
options: She has been working for two hours.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I am eating rice."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I have eaten rice...."?
options: I have been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I have eaten rice."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I have been eating..."?
options: I have been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I have been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I have been eating rice for an hour."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I ate rice...."?
options: I will have been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I ate rice."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I was eating rice...."?
options: She had been working for two hours.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I was eating rice."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I had eaten rice...."?
options: I had been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I had eaten rice."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I had been eating..."?
options: I had been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I had been eating rice for an hour.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I had been eating rice for an hour."
